category_sources: Official homepage https://bulletty.croci.dev/ describes bulletty as a TUI RSS/Atom feed reader.
source_facts.description says it is a feed reader for ATOM/RSS stored as Markdown.
display_name_sources: Official docs title at https://bulletty.croci.dev/ uses the name bulletty.
docs_sources: Official MkDocs site at source_facts.homepage has a Docs section and CLI Reference.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/CrociDB/bulletty, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official homepage https://bulletty.croci.dev/ lists RSS/Atom, terminal reading, and Markdown storage.
